versions.version_description: This can be played on either acoustic or clean electric guitar,where chords are not so well known i have added instruction to top of tab,i have also included all chords and lyrics,whilst keeping it achievable to play with ease.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zpOULjyy-n8.
I saw this from zerobio youtube channel, it sounds great. Please go to: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xwh00p1slWk.
Capo on the 1st fret to match original song.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
I can't fight this feeling any longer[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
And yet I'm still afraid to let it flow[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
What started out as friendship, has grown stronger[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
I only wish I had the strength to let it show[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
I tell myself that I can't hold out forever[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
I say there is no reason for my fear[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
Cause I feel so secure when were together[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
You give my life direction[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
You make everything so clear[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
And even as I wander[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'm keeping you in sight[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
You're a candle in the window[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
On a cold, dark winters night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
And I'm getting closer than I ever thought I might[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And I can't fight this feeling anymore[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
I've forgotten what I started fighting for[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
It's time to bring this ship into the shore[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
And throw away the oars, forever[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Cause I can't fight this feeling anymore[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
I've forgotten what I started fighting for[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]
And if I have to crawl upon the floor[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Come crashing through your door[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, I can't fight this feeling anymore[/tab]


[Solo]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
My life has been such a whirlwind since I saw you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
I've been running round in circles in my mind[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
And it always seems that I'm following you, girl[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Cause you take me to the places that alone I'd never find[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
And even as I wander[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'm keeping you in sight[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
You're a candle in the window[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
On a cold, dark winters night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
And I'm getting closer than I ever thought I might[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And I can't fight this feeling anymore[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
I've forgotten what I started fighting for[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
It's time to bring this ship into the shore[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
And throw away the oars, forever[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Cause I can't fight this feeling anymore[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
I've forgotten what I started fighting for[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]
And if I have to crawl upon the floor[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Come crashing through your door[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, I can't fight this feeling anymore[/tab]
